creator: alexandre.perrin@epfl.ch
text:
update xproto to 7.0.11. I'm trying to port the awesome WM 3.1 to FreeBSD, and it a newer xproto than the current. The 7.0.10 to 7.0.11 changes are basicly comments and build changes, here follows the Changelog:

Eric Anholt:
      Describe what XF86XK_Display does (or now is meant to do).

James Cloos:
      Add *~ to .gitignore to skip patch/emacs droppings
      Comment on the new locations of the files referenced in keysymdef.h
      Add dead_abovecomma and dead_abovereversedcomma
      bump to 7.0.11

Colin Harrison:
      bcopy needs definition in Xfuncs.h for Xming

Zephaniah E. Hull:
      Add keysym definitions from Jim Gettys.

Tilman Sauerbeck:
      Enable GCC's visibility attributes on GCC 4 or greater only.
      Added some more files to .gitignore.

git tag: xproto-7.0.11

diff of the x11/xproto ports is attached.
Thanks for reading ;)

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
